summary: Seeded envelope. An apartment finder that matches you with a roommate and a place — and signs the lease in one flow. Live web research has not run yet; invoke 'npm run research -- --id gen_z_apartment_finder_with_roommate_matching' to populate citations.

dead_saas_matches.rationale: Risk profile overlaps Lilium (Hardware scaling chasm; regulatory delays; capital intensity exceeded projections).
Risk profile overlaps Vroom (High operational costs; inventory management failure; macroeconomic headwinds).
